title: SugarCraft — CandyTesting
description: CandyTesting: Test harness for TEA programs — ProgramSimulator, golden-file assertions, and snapshot helpers for SugarCraft.
ogDescription: ProgramSimulator drives a Program with scripted input; captures model/view/cmds. Assertions provides assertGoldenAnsi, assertCellGrid, assertAnsiEquals. TapeRecorder emits VHS .tape files.
